---
title: "Board 2023–2027 - Detailed"
description: "Detailed information about the RC42 Board for the 2023–2027 term."
---

## Board 2023–2027 - Detailed

This page provides detailed information about each member of the RC42 Social Psychology board for the 2023–2027 term.

For a summary view, see [Board 2023–2027](index.qmd).

---

### President: Juan Carlos Castillo

- **Affiliation**: Universidad de Chile, Chile
- **Biography**: Content to be confirmed by the RC42 board.
- **Also serving as**: Program Coordinator for the XXI ISA World Congress of Sociology 2027.

---

### Secretary/Treasurer: Lisa Slattery Walker

- **Affiliation**: University of North Carolina at Charlotte, USA
- **Biography**: Content to be confirmed by the RC42 board.

---

### Online Communication Manager

- **Status**: To be announced.

---

### Board Member: Charles Puttergill

- **Affiliation**: University of Pretoria, South Africa
- **Biography**: Content to be confirmed by the RC42 board.

---

### Board Member: Karla Henríquez Ojeda

- **Affiliation**: Université catholique de Louvain, Belgium
- **Biography**: Content to be confirmed by the RC42 board.

---

### Board Member: Deepak Kumar Verma

- **Affiliation**: Dr. B. R. Ambedkar University of Social Sciences, India
- **Biography**: Content to be confirmed by the RC42 board.

---

::: {.info-box}
Board members are elected at the ISA World Congress of Sociology. For information on previous boards, see [Past Boards](../people/past-boards/index.qmd).
:::
